title: Sovereign Trail Memo Ontology
description: Definition of a molecular Memo in the CORTEX Trail-as-a-Service DAG.

id.description: Deterministic sha256 of the canonical JSON of this memo.

type.description: The primitive ontological type of the Memo.

core_content.description: The distilled essence of the event (e.g., 'Migrated to AES-256 local', 'Race condition in SDK').

derivation_reason.description: The logic or axiom that motivated this memo (e.g., 'Ω3 Zero Trust', 'Antifragile Healing').

resolution.description: The final state or code solution adopted. Required for DECISION, SCAR, and BRIDGE.

derivation_hash.description: Deterministic sha256 hash of the parent node logic payload.

entropy_score.description: Semantic density / Gravitational pull. 1.0 is absolute gravity (fatal error or paradigm shift), 0.1 is localized patch.

is_resolved.description: Strictly for GHOST objects. If true, the ghost no longer exerts gravity.

parents.description: List of parent Memo IDs. This establishes the DAG topology.
